candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets balancing line, not current assets.
Non-current assets total, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported current-assets total.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: CASH AND CASH EQUIVALENTS AT YEAR-END
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash agrees numerically, but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of the year
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not the year-end balance sheet amount.

candidates.row_label: Exchange difference in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX adjustment line, not cash balance.
Not a cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash line as preferred.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Only interest-bearing current liabilities, not total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities balancing line, not current liabilities total.
Non-current liabilities total, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported current-liabilities total.

candidates.why: Best clean balance-sheet label for current debt / short-term interest-bearing debt; excludes lease liabilities and aligns with STD concept.
Current portion of long-term debt; useful fallback when clean current debt total is unavailable.
Semantically also fits current debt, but preview values are absent while a cleaner populated line exists.
Cash flow movement, not a balance-sheet stock of short-term debt.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current debt line. Excluded 'Current lease liabilities' per rule. Did not add 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' to avoid potential double counting with the broader current interest-bearing liabilities total.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable/current tax liabilities line.

variables.notes: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Best available total tangible fixed assets line, which corresponds most closely to total/net PPE under IFRS.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depr/Imp Other Tangible Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation contra-asset, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Other Tangible Fixed Assets, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value line, not the reported PPE total.
Intangibles are not PPE.
Intangibles balancing line, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Total Intangible Assets ex Goodwill, Net
candidates.why: Intangible assets, not PPE.
Capex flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Cash flow and intangible-related, not PPE.

variables.notes: Chose 'Tangibles' outside the shortlist because it is the reported balance-sheet total for tangible fixed assets and is the closest match to net PPE.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Exact net cash flow from operating activities line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Used the final net operating cash flow line rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
